theme_and_archetype.rationale: High energy, tactical minimalism, command-center focus for the live scoreboard and admin panel. Absolute clarity for real-time data.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing vs Dense Control Room

grids.game_library: Tetris grid pattern. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3. Wide gaps (gap-8).
grids.admin_dashboard: Control Room grid. Tight gaps (gap-4). Dense, full pixel utilization. No jagged bottoms.
grids.live_scoreboard: Control Room grid focused on horizontal player rank rows. gap-4.

layout_and_spacing.containers: Containers with borders MUST have generous internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

surface_strategies.qr_code_modal: Glassmorphism. backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/60 border border-white/10. Ambient shadow.
surface_strategies.stats_tables: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. border-collapse with subtle right/bottom borders on grid items.
surface_strategies.active_game_card: The Tracing Beam effect. Subtle moving gradient border to signal 'Active/Live'.
surface_strategies.admin_controls: Flat solid surfaces. 1px subtle border. High contrast on focus states.

live_updates.rank_change: Framer Motion layout animations. Flash row background to accent_up/down temporarily on rank shift.
live_updates.score_pill: Background flash to accent_live (#FACC15) decaying to transparent over 1.5s.
live_updates.live_badge: animate-pulse on a 6px circular dot, plus an outer pinging ring.
live_updates.waiting_screen: CSS/Framer motion animation of orbiting dice around a central logo. Smooth infinite rotation.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: translate-y-[-2px] with increased shadow and text color brightening. Never rely on inheritance.

component_instructions.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no heavy drop-shadows. Minimalist geometry.
component_instructions.tables: Use Shadcn Table. Apply F-Pattern scanning logic. Emphasize the 'North Star' metric (Score/Wins). Allow expandable rows for game history breakdowns.
component_instructions.forms_inputs: Use Shadcn components heavily customized to match the dark theme. Deep dark backgrounds, high-contrast borders.
component_instructions.badges: For achievements/team modes: high-contrast geometric pills. No soft pastels.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark texture for live scoreboard background overlay
Close-up of board game pieces for game library cards

testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. E.g., data-testid='submit-score-button', data-testid='player-rank-1'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Note: Ensure to use .js/.jsx extensions for React files, not .tsx.
Configure Tailwind with the specified color palette and fonts (Outfit for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body).
Do NOT use HTML input type='date' or basic select. Use Shadcn components for all forms.
Implement WebSockets securely for real-time live scoreboard updates.
Ensure the QR Code generation uses a valid library and places the code inside the defined Glassmorphism modal.
Implement the Game Timer & Turn Tracker with bold, technical typography (Outfit).
For PDF/CSV export, ensure buttons are clearly visible and styled with the Primary color.
CRITICAL: Follow the data-testid rules for every interactive component to ensure robust testing.
